text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day at the dorm, there's a travel program on
TV.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wowie! That sure is pretty!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hidden hot springs, huh? Sure sounds like a trip
worth making.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Hehe. Spe's in such a good mood today.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Hm... Speaking of hot springs...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember how I won that hot spring
vacation coupon in the raffle at the shopping
district?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it, I do remember...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Who should I invite? Vacations are such special
occasions, after all...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you could hold on to this coupon
for me, please?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on it, I've been keeping that
coupon safe since then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't decide what I wanted to do with it back
then, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I think I know now. Would you like to go with me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'd love for you to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That was wonderful. It was so quiet, and the water
was nice and hot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hot spring was as soothing as she says. I
nearly lost track of time while relaxing in there.
choice_data_list:
I might've soaked a little too long. I feel a little
lightheaded.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh no...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I know what we can do to help cool you
down.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I was just thinking about how I'd like to go
for a walk outside.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Would you like to join me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk with Silence Suzuka down a rural road that
seems to stretch for miles.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Doesn't the breeze feel so good?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks so happy, I can't help but wonder if the
reason she wanted to go on this vacation was to
enjoy the lush nature around the inn.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Right? It seems like this road might go on forever.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I bet if I started running, I'd be able to see all
sorts of new scenery...
choice_data_list: You're not about to sprint off on me, are you?
You're not about to sprint off on me, are you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... No. I was just imagining it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I do feel like going for a run...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But right now, this is exactly where I want to be.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I want to stay by your side, walking together at
the same pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taken aback for a moment by her unexpected
announcement.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember when we first met? The scenery
back then was just like this.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Since then, I've run so much, and seen so many
different sights.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I ran so quickly I couldn't even see
what was around me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The road we've traveled to make it this far is just
like this one we're walking along right
now—bumpy, rough, and anything but easy to
traverse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And for three years, we've done nothing but run
down it in earnest.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Maybe that's why I feel this way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Like it's all right to take things slow every once in
a while, and simply move forward one step at a
time...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All while taking in new scenery with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes sparkle like shooting stars in the night
sky.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I hope I get to see more new scenery in the future.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And I hope you'll still be by my side when I do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the rest of the walk down that endless,
bumpy country road exchanging only a few words
from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Silence Suzuka and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
